title: epilobium montanum subsp. duriaei
intro: Epilobium montanum subsp. duriaei, also known as the alpine willowherb, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the evening primrose family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have been shown to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Epilobium montanum subsp. duriaei include its ability to support urinary tract health, reduce inflammation, and exhibit potential anti-cancer properties. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal medicine to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
